messages.text: Necrotic power floods into you and your servants, quickening every strike with dark hunger.
Necrotic power floods into {name}, wreathing them in dark hunger.
The borrowed necrotic power ebbs out of you and your minions.
The necrotic power wreathing {name} ebbs away.
{name} is wreathed in hungering necrotic power that sharpens every strike.
